_comment: The shared worker<->supervisor handshake contract. Pinned identically in C++ (engine/core/serve/server_shared.hpp PROTOCOL_VERSION + the /health handler capability keys) and Python (clozn/protocol.py). tests/test_protocol_handshake.py fails the moment any side drifts. Studio may also read this file to stay in lockstep. See protocol/SPEC.md for the stream vocabulary.
